_meta.keyKnowledge: We use our preferred way of communicating to say what we need or want.

_source.w: We use our preferred way of communicating to say what we need or want.
y: Expressing our needs helps others look after us well.
Communication is the key to getting our needs met.
Learning to express ourselves builds our independence.
eg: We point to or look at something we want.
We use sounds, words or a device to say we are hungry or tired.
We push away something we do not want.
We pull someone's hand towards something we need help with.
We use a picture board to show what we need.
We cry or make sounds to show we are uncomfortable.
